underlying_goal: Configure the OpenSearch neural search model (sentence-transformers/all-distilroberta-v1) correctly, including understanding embedding limits and fixing incorrect index configuration parameters
friction_detail: Claude initially suggested changing space_type to innerproduct, but the user pointed to project documentation showing l2 was the correct choice — Claude had given wrong fix advice.
brief_summary: User needed to verify embedding character limits and fix OpenSearch index configuration; Claude initially gave the wrong fix (innerproduct instead of l2) but corrected after user pointed to project docs.
